label: Interface Complexity & Cognitive Load
description: Users felt overwhelmed by layout density, too many options, or high cognitive burden.

label: Authentication & Setup Barriers
description: Users struggled with account creation, authentication, onboarding, or configuration.

label: Encryption Transparency & Understanding
description: Users were unsure when encryption was active or what security options meant.

label: Trust & Security Perception
description: Users described trust, reassurance, privacy, or concern about service-level security.

label: Learning Curve & Adoption Challenges
description: Users discussed difficulty of learning, long-term adoption, or effort required to become proficient.
